sample_chat_banner.label: Sample chat — try replying to Aiko to see how Nuansu translates.

message_1.author: mine
message_1.source: Hey Aiko, want to grab coffee in Shibuya this weekend?
message_1.target: Aiko、今週末Shibuyaでコーヒーでもどう?

message_2.author: theirs
message_2.source: うん、いいね!Shibuya駅の近くで会おう。
message_2.target: Sounds good! Let's meet near Shibuya station.

message_3.author: mine
message_3.source: Try sending Aiko a real message — type below.
message_3.target: Aikoに実際のメッセージを送ってみよう — 下に入力してください。
